creator: owen94012@gmail.com
text:
The email address is valid and should not be an issue.

I am learning to do more tests on these ports before I submit them

We (strongly) encourage contributors to test/QA proposed changes with the tools that our developers use, both to improve their skills but also to identify any issues early and save time/resources.

- Consider settting DISTNAME=zipios++, so that MASTER_SITES doesn't need to be customised (and one can just use 'SF')

I asked about this issue and it was also brought up in comment #6 as well: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=223176#c6

The maintainers want to change the name to zipios and they did do that on the github page but the older SF page; which is no longer maintained still uses zipios++

I thought it would be better to go with zipios since that's where all the work is being done.

- Obsolete any older/outdated attachments, so only one is visible. This makes it more obvious and avoids confusion. You can do this via Attachment -> Details -> Edit Details -> [x] Obsolete

Done
